entities.name: Careerspan
entities.context: Candidate sourcing and screening tool used in hiring searches

entities.name: Bonfire
entities.context: Company/client running a hiring search, evaluating candidates via Careerspan

entities.name: retrospective
entities.context: Post-search review process evaluating candidate quality, screening effort saved, and intuition match

entities.name: case study
entities.context: Documentation of search outcomes that can benefit both Bonfire and Careerspan

relationships.context: Careerspan surfaces candidates for Bonfire's hiring search
Bonfire participates in retrospective to evaluate search outcomes
Careerspan participates in retrospective to assess tool effectiveness
Retrospective findings can become a case study for both organizations
